info.description: NearBlocks REST API for the NEAR Protocol block explorer. Provides endpoints to access blockchain data including accounts, transactions, blocks, tokens, NFTs, and staking.
info.title: NearBlocks Explorer API

get.summary: Get latest action args for contract method

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Each increment of 25 will count towards rate limit. For example, per page 50 will use 2 credits.

get.summary: Get account txns by pagination (NOT RECOMMENDED)
get.description:
**NOT RECOMMENDED**: This endpoint is no longer recommended for large accounts due to performance issue.
For large accounts, it is better to query txns and receipts separately:
- account/{account_id}/txns-only
- account/{account_id}/receipts

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Next page cursor, takes precedence over 'page' if provided

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Each increment of 25 will count towards rate limit. For example, per page 50 will use 2 credits.
